info.title: American Advisor Inspecciones API
info.description: REST API for mining vehicle inspection management. Handles clients, equipment, inspection requests, work orders, inspection templates, inspections with answers/photos/findings, and dashboard statistics.

tags.name: Inspection Templates
tags.description: Inspection template management with sections and questions

tags.name: Inspections
tags.description: Inspection execution, answers, photos, and findings

post.description: Authenticate a user and receive a Sanctum bearer token. Default users: Admin (admin@americanadvisor.com / password), Inspector (inspector@americanadvisor.com / password), Supervisor (supervisor@americanadvisor.com / password).
Revoke the current access token.

get.description: Return the authenticated user's profile.
Retrieve a paginated list of users. Filterable by role and search term.

post.description: Create a new user account.

get.description: Retrieve summary statistics including total clients, equipment, inspections, pending work orders, inspections this month, and recent inspections.
Retrieve a paginated list of clients. Includes equipment count. Filterable by search and active status.

parameters.name: is_active
parameters.description: Filter by active status (true or false)

post.description: Create a new client.

get.description: Retrieve a single client by ID. Includes equipment count.

put.description: Update an existing client. All fields are optional.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of equipment. Includes related client. Filterable by search, client_id, status, and type.

post.description: Create a new equipment/vehicle record.

get.description: Retrieve a single equipment record by ID. Includes related client.

delete.description: Delete an equipment record by ID.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of service types. Filterable by search and active status.

post.description: Create a new service type.

get.description: Retrieve a single service type by ID.

delete.description: Delete a service type by ID.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of inspection requests. Includes client, service type, and work order count. Filterable by search, client_id, status, and service_type_id.

post.description: Create a new inspection request. The request_number is auto-generated. The created_by field is set to the authenticated user.

get.description: Retrieve a single inspection request by ID. Includes client, service type, creator, and work orders.

delete.description: Delete an inspection request by ID.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of inspection templates. Filterable by search, is_active, and vehicle_type.

post.description: Create a new inspection template with optional nested sections and questions.

get.description: Retrieve a single inspection template by ID. Includes sections ordered by 'order' field, and each section includes its questions ordered by 'order' field.

200.description: Inspection template data with sections and questions

put.description: Update an existing inspection template. Supports full replacement of sections and questions. Sections/questions without an 'id' field are created; those with an 'id' are updated; existing sections/questions not present in the request are deleted.

delete.description: Delete an inspection template by ID.

post.description: Create a copy of an existing inspection template including all sections and questions. The copy gets a new code with '-COPY-{timestamp}' suffix, incremented version, and is_active set to false.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the template to duplicate

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of work orders. Includes inspection request and inspector. Filterable by search, inspection_request_id, inspector_id, and status.

post.description: Create a new work order with one or more items. Each item links an equipment to an inspection template. The order_number is auto-generated.

get.description: Retrieve a single work order by ID. Includes inspection request, inspector, and items with equipment and template.

put.description: Update an existing work order's metadata (does not update items).

delete.description: Delete a work order by ID.

post.description: Transition a work order to 'in_progress' status and record the started_at timestamp.
Transition a work order to 'completed' status and record the completed_at timestamp. All work order items must be in 'completed' or 'skipped' status before the work order can be completed.

422.description: Not all items are completed or skipped

get.description: Retrieve all items for a specific work order. Each item includes related equipment and template.
Retrieve a paginated list of inspections. Includes template, equipment, and inspector. Filterable by work_order_id, inspector_id, status, and equipment_id.

parameters.name: work_order_id
parameters.description: Filter by work order ID (finds inspections whose work order item belongs to this work order)

post.description: Start a new inspection from a work order item. The inspection template and equipment are derived from the work order item. The inspector is set to the authenticated user. The inspection starts in 'in_progress' status.

get.description: Retrieve a single inspection by ID. Includes template with sections/questions, answers, photos, findings with photos, work order item with work order, inspector, and equipment.

200.description: Inspection data with all related resources

post.description: Save or update answers for an inspection. Uses upsert logic (updateOrCreate) based on inspection_id + template_question_id. Answers to yes_no questions are automatically checked against fail_values and flagged accordingly.

Submit a completed inspection for supervisor approval. Calculates the score based on yes/no answers and their flagged status. Sets overall_result to 'approved' (0 flagged), 'conditionally_approved' (<=30% flagged), or 'rejected' (>30% flagged). Changes status to 'submitted' (pending supervisor approval). The inspection must then be approved by a supervisor or admin before it is marked as 'completed'.

Approve a submitted inspection as a supervisor or admin. Optionally override the auto-calculated final_result. Sets status to 'completed', records approved_by and approved_at. Also marks the related work order item as 'completed'.

final_result.description: Optional override of the auto-calculated result

403.description: Forbidden – user is not a supervisor or admin

post.description: Return a submitted inspection to the inspector for corrections. Sets status to 'returned'. Requires supervisor or admin role.

supervisor_notes.description: Explanation of what needs to be corrected

403.description: Forbidden – user is not a supervisor or admin

post.description: Upload one or more photos for an inspection. Photos can optionally be linked to a template question or finding. Files are stored in 'inspections/{inspection_id}/' on the public disk. Max file size is 5MB per image.
Create a new finding directly associated with an inspection. The inspection_id is taken from the URL path.

Record a signature (inspector, supervisor, or client) for a submitted or completed inspection. Inspector and client sign at submit time (status 'submitted'), supervisor signs after approval (status 'completed'). The signature is a base64-encoded PNG image from a signature canvas. Inspector must be the assigned inspector. Supervisor must have supervisor or admin role. Client signature can be recorded by any authenticated user (inspector lends device). Each role can only sign once.

signature.description: Base64-encoded PNG image of the signature (optionally with data:image/png;base64, prefix)

403.description: Unauthorized to sign with the specified role

422.description: Inspection not in submitted/completed status, signature already exists, or invalid data

get.description: Generates the 'Informe Preliminar de Inspección' (R3 PEAT 01 REV.07) as a PDF document. Only available for inspections with status 'submitted' or 'completed'.

422.description: Inspection status is not submitted or completed

get.description: Generates a preview PDF of the inspection report. Available for inspections in any status (including in_progress). Includes a 'PREVIEW' watermark.
Retrieve a paginated list of findings. Includes related question. Filterable by inspection_id, severity, and is_resolved.

post.description: Create a new finding. Requires an inspection_id in the request body.

get.description: Retrieve a single finding by ID. Includes related question, resolver, and photos.

put.description: Update an existing finding. When is_resolved is set to true, resolved_at and resolved_by are automatically set. When set back to false, they are cleared.

bearerAuth.description: Use the token returned from POST /login

SearchParam.name: search
SearchParam.description: Search term (matches against relevant text fields)

Unauthenticated.description: Unauthenticated - missing or invalid bearer token

equipment_count.description: Only present when equipment count is loaded

metadata.description: Dynamic fields specific to equipment type (e.g., estructura_dimensiones, capacidad_max_perforacion, estacion_de_control, clave, oblea, normas_referencia, proxima_inspeccion)

example.normas_referencia:
PE ATI 03 Procedimiento Especial para la Inspección de equipos especiales.
IE ATI 18 Instructivo Especial de Inspección y Evaluación de Defectos. PERFORADORA.

client.description: Included when client relationship is loaded

description.example: Inspeccion diaria antes del uso del equipo

fail_values.description: Values that trigger a flagged answer. For yes_no: '0' means false/No is a fail, '1' means true/Yes is a fail.

approved_by.description: User ID of the supervisor who approved/returned the inspection

approved_at.description: Timestamp when the inspection was approved

supervisor_notes.description: Notes from the supervisor during approval or return

approver.description: Supervisor who approved the inspection. Included when loaded

inspector_signature.description: URL to the inspector's signature PNG

supervisor_signature.description: URL to the supervisor's signature PNG

client_signature.description: URL to the client's signature PNG

all_signatures_complete.description: True when all 3 signatures (inspector, supervisor, client) have been recorded

InspectionDetail.description: Full inspection with all nested relationships (used by show and submit endpoints)

answer_json.description: Arbitrary JSON data for complex answer types

is_flagged.description: Automatically set based on fail_values comparison

description.example: Hydraulic oil leak detected on main cylinder

resolved_by.description: User ID who resolved the finding

FindingDetail.description: Finding with all nested relationships (used by show endpoint)

pending_reviews.description: Number of inspections with 'submitted' status awaiting supervisor approval

recent_inspections.description: Last 5 inspections with equipment, inspector, and template

metadata.description: Dynamic fields specific to equipment type
Dynamic fields specific to equipment type

description.example: Inspeccion diaria antes del uso del equipo

service_type_id.description: Must reference an existing service type
Must reference an existing service type

sections.description: Full replacement: sections without an 'id' are created, those with 'id' are updated, existing sections not in the array are deleted.

id.description: Include to update an existing section; omit to create a new one
Include to update an existing question; omit to create a new one

inspection_request_id.description: Must reference an existing inspection request

inspection_template_id.description: Must reference an existing inspection template

inspection_request_id.description: Must reference an existing inspection request

work_order_item_id.description: Must reference an existing work order item. The inspection template, equipment, and inspector are derived from the item and authenticated user.

template_question_id.description: Must reference an existing template question
Optional: link photo to a specific question

finding_id.description: Optional: link photo to a specific finding

description.example: Hydraulic oil leak detected on main cylinder

template_question_id.description: Optional: link finding to a specific question
Optional: link finding to a specific question

description.example: Hydraulic oil leak detected on main cylinder

is_resolved.description: When set to true, resolved_at and resolved_by are automatically populated. When set back to false, they are cleared.
